title: UserPermission
description: Details of a permission and its availability to a user.

deprecatedKey.description: Indicate whether the permission key is deprecated. Note that deprecated keys cannot be used in the `permissions parameter of Get my permissions. Deprecated keys are not returned by Get all permissions.`

havePermission.description: Whether the permission is available to the user in the queried context.

id.description: The ID of the permission. Either `id` or `key` must be specified. Use [Get all permissions](#api-rest-api-3-permissions-get) to get the list of permissions.

key.description: The key of the permission. Either `id` or `key` must be specified. Use [Get all permissions](#api-rest-api-3-permissions-get) to get the list of permissions.
